summary: Stellar soundboard recording with crystal‑clear audio and a fireworks jam sequence featuring Estimated Prophet, Eyes of the World, St. Stephen and Sugar Magnolia.
review: The Miller‑patched SBD capture is described as “out of this world” and extremely listenable, delivering pristine guitar tones and a balanced mix. Musically the show shines with an unforgettable jam that strings together Estimated Prophet → Eyes of the World → St. Stephen → Sugar Magnolia, plus standout moments like Peggy‑O and Jerry’s soaring guitar work.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviewers are enthusiastic (average 4.6 stars), praising both the performance (highlighted jams, strong setlist) and the audio quality (soundboard, Miller‑patched excellence).

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers call the sound "out of this world" and note it is very listenable; Miller's patch work yields a clear, balanced mix with no reported drop‑outs or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows smoothly, building to a spectacular jam sequence (Estimated→Eyes→St. Stephen→Sugar Magnolia) that reviewers cite as the high point of the run.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Jerry’s guitar work is highlighted as “right there” with jazzy/bluesy runs that make the show enjoyable.
